element_introduction_order.element: Transformation mechanic (character power-up to superhero form)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Stage-based progression with escalating difficulty toward boss encounters; tension climaxes at stage conclusions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic platforming and combat with manageable enemy encounters in stages 1-2
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and complexity; transformation mechanics become essential for progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 3-4 feature demanding boss encounters; mastery of transformation and combat timing required
notable_spikes: Stage boss encounters at conclusion of each stage

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 4 stages follows progression from basic platforming through enemy encounters to climactic boss fight; mechanics introduced early are reinforced in later encounters
Character transformation into superhero form serves as both power fantasy and mechanical upgrade, enabling progression through tougher enemy encounters
